source_jobs.title: Sales Executive - Germany (Remote, Contract - South Africa)
source_jobs.description:
Got Drive? Join AnyVan as we make moving anything, anywhere miles better and build a career that moves just as fast.



Back in 2009, our CEO Angus saw half-empty vans everywhere and knew there had to be a better way! That's how AnyVan began. He set out to create the world's most efficient logistics technology and help halve the number of wasted miles by filling those empty vans.



Since then we've become the nation's favourite way to move, with over 150k five-star reviews and 5 million customers in the UK and Europe. Our team of 400 AnyVanners across London, Cape Town and Bogota is proving that moving doesn't have to cost the earth by helping save 8,520 tonnes of Carbon each year.




Big Energy. Big Deals. Big Paydays.

Tired of jobs that feel like groundhog day? At AnyVan, you get the thrill of the chase without the boring stuff. We hand you warm leads, you bring the hustle, and together we make big moves (literally…we move houses, pianos, hot tubs, you name it - we've got a van for that!).



Your Day-to-Day

 - Speak with German customers (in German) who already need us (warm leads only).

 - Build trust, upsell smartly, and close with confidence.

 - Manage your pipeline like it’s your own business.

 - Collaborate with your manager to keep levelling up.

 - Share insights that help shape our growth.
   
   

What You Won’t Be Doing

 - Hunt for leads.

 - Sit in endless admin loops.

 - Waste energy on “busy work.”



We’re Looking For:

 - Sales experience with a track record of smashing targets.

 - You bring enthusiasm, resilience, and the hunger to succeed.

 - You’re a strong communicator who can build rapport quickly.

 - You’ve got a positive mindset and don’t give up when things get tricky.

 - You pay attention to detail and learn fast.

 - You thrive in a buzzing, supportive sales team.

 - You speak and write English and German fluently.
   
   

Why AnyVan?

We’re not your average sales floor; we’re a fast-scaling online marketplace across Europe, which means your career can move as quickly as your numbers do. We reward performance, not just presence, and back your growth with hands-on coaching, recognition, and benefits that make the ride worth it.



What We Offer:

💰 Competitive Salary - Great base salary + Uncapped commission

🚀 Career Growth - Join a disruptive technology leader and fast forward your career move



 - 

 - 

Our company values are:

 - Have fun, get it done

 - Progress over perfection

 - One team thinking big
   


YOU CAN FIND OUT MORE ABOUT OUR CULTURE HERE:

https://www.anyvan.com/careers



DE&I

We are committed to building an inclusive and diverse workplace where every voice is heard, every perspective is valued, and every individual has the opportunity to thrive. We welcome applicants from all backgrounds to be part of our mission and contribute to our vibrant culture.

What We Offer:

Our company values are:

 - Progress over perfection

source_jobs.title: Head of Operations - France
source_jobs.description:
Got Drive? Join AnyVan as we make moving anything, anywhere miles better and build a career that moves just as fast.



Back in 2009, our CEO Angus saw half-empty vans everywhere and knew there had to be a better way! That's how AnyVan began. He set out to create the world's most efficient logistics technology and help halve the number of wasted miles by filling those empty vans.



Since then we've become the nation's favourite way to move, with over 150k five-star reviews and 5 million customers in the UK and Europe. Our team of 400 AnyVanners across London, Cape Town and Bogota is proving that moving doesn't have to cost the earth by helping save 8,520 tonnes of Carbon each year.


Our French operations are growing fast and we need someone to run it.

This is a genuinely end-to-end leadership role. From the moment a customer books, you’re accountable for delivering a great experience, keeping our transport-partner network strong and reliable, and running the operation profitably all the way through to a completed move.



You’ll be the single owner of how France performs day to day, leading a multi-site, French-speaking teams based in Cape Town and Senegal. It’s hands-on, commercial and high-impact: the decisions you make are felt directly by customers, by our transport partners, and on the bottom line.



It's one of our fastest-growing markets and we’re investing to scale it. That’s where you come in.


What you'll do:



Lead the French customer operations

 - You’ll run a French-speaking customer service team across phone, WhatsApp, live chat and email, making sure customers can reach us quickly and leave happy.

 - You’ll own the end-to-end experience: resolving complaints, handling damage claims and refunds quickly and fairly, and keeping our reputation strong on Google and Trustpilot.

 - You’ll also lead the team through process improvements as the market grows, and keep a tight grip on refund and damage-claim risk.



Match every job to the right partner, profitably

 - Our service depends on connecting each booked move to the right transport partner at the right price.

 - You’ll own this for France: maximising the share of jobs covered smoothly and cost-effectively, minimising last-minute gaps and drop-outs, and working with our routing, optimisation and pricing teams to combine jobs into shared routes and fill return trips.

 - Margin matters here as much as service quality.



Build and lead the transport-partner network

 - You’ll grow and manage the supply base that keeps France running.

 - That means recruiting and onboarding new transport partners, keeping existing partners engaged, well-supported and performing, and acting decisively when standards slip.

 - A strong, reliable network is the backbone of what we do.



Lead and grow your team

 - You’ll be based in the office and on the floor with your team in Cape Town and just as effectively, you'll be leading the team in our Senegal office remotely. Visible, engaged and setting the standard every day.

 - You’ll also roll up your sleeves: jumping on calls when needed, unblocking issues in real time, and building a culture where people take real ownership of the customer experience.

 - You’ll recruit, coach and develop a multi-site team across Cape Town and Senegal, setting clear goals, holding a high bar and delivering a team of high performers
   
   

What you’ll be measured on

You’ll own a clear, commercial scorecard. The headline measures are:

 - Customer satisfaction (NPS) and how quickly we respond across all channels

 - Cost to serve and operating margin for France

 - Transport-partner network coverage and reliability, active partners, new partners onboarded, and the rate of last-minute drop-outs

 - Speed and fairness of complaints, damage claims and refunds

 - Team engagement, retention and productivity



What success looks like

 - Within six to twelve months, France runs predictably and profitably.

 - Customers reach us quickly and ra

source_jobs.title: Sales Executive - Italy
source_jobs.description:
Got Drive? Join AnyVan as we make moving anything, anywhere miles better and build a career that moves just as fast.



Back in 2009, our CEO Angus saw half-empty vans everywhere and knew there had to be a better way! That's how AnyVan began. He set out to create the world's most efficient logistics technology and help halve the number of wasted miles by filling those empty vans.



Since then we've become the nation's favourite way to move, with over 150k five-star reviews and 5 million customers in the UK and Europe. Our team of 400 AnyVanners across London, Cape Town and Bogota is proving that moving doesn't have to cost the earth by helping save 8,520 tonnes of Carbon each year.


Big Energy. Big Deals. Big Paydays.

Four our reverse auction sales executives at At AnyVan, sales isn’t “answer the phone and take the order.” It’s where we win customers, build trust fast, and convert with discipline in real time.



We’re hiring a Reverse Auction Sales Executive to work with our customers in Italy, who doesn’t hide behind scripts, slow follow-ups, or “I’ll email you a quote.” This is a fast-paced, high-volume, commercial role for someone who thrives on pace, pressure, and negotiation, turning warm demand into booked revenue by running live competition between suppliers.



You’ll be accountable for converting inbound enquiries into confirmed bookings through speed, negotiation, pipeline ownership, and commercial judgement every day.


What you'll be doing:

 - Own your desk like a business: You’ll manage your pipeline end-to-end response time, follow-ups, conversion, margin, and booked revenue.

 - Move fast on warm inbound leads: Contact customers within minutes, control the call, qualify quickly, and keep momentum high.

 - Run live reverse auctions: Engage multiple transport partners to compete for the job and secure the best viable rate.

 - Negotiate with confidence: Balance customer value and supplier pricing while protecting margin and booking quality.

 - Convert with discipline: Drive every enquiry to a clear outcome, booked, timed follow-up, or closed out properly.

 - Upsell value where it matters: Add services that genuinely improve the customer outcome and increase booking value.

 - Track your numbers daily: You’ll manage activity → conversion → revenue and know exactly what lever to pull to win more.
   
   

You'll thrive here if you:

 - Love pressure and do your best work when targets are tough

 - Obsess over speed → negotiation → conversion, and know how to win in each moment

 - Can juggle multiple live deals without dropping detail or standards

 - Bring energy and ownership, you don’t need chasing

 - Treat sales like a competitive sport: disciplined, daily, relentless

 - Enjoy commercial problem-solving and protecting margin while winning customers
   
   

This is NOT:

 - A call centre “take the order” role

 - A slow sales cycle where you wait days for decisions

 - Role for someone who avoids negotiation or feels uncomfortable talking about money

 - A place to hide behind “the customer ghosted” you own follow-up and urgency

 - For you if you need to be micromanaged to stay sharp on pace, pipeline, and targets

 - A discount-first environment, we win with speed, value, and control
   
   

What you'll bring:

 - Must be fluent in both Italian and English

 - Proven success in a high-performance, target-driven sales environment

 - Strong negotiation ability and commercial instinct (margin mindset)

 - You’re a strong communicator who can build rapport quickly.

 - Comfort handling objections, controlling calls, and closing confidently

 - Excellent pipeline discipline and follow-up execution

 - You bring enthusiasm, resilience, and the hunger to succeed.

 - You pay attention to detail and learn fast.

 - You thrive in a buzzing, supportive sales floor.

Bonus points: experience in logistics/freight brokerage, 360° recruitment, estate agency, car sales, insurance broking, or marketplace businesse

source_jobs.title: Ejecutivo de Ventas
source_jobs.description:
Got Drive? Join AnyVan as we make moving anything, anywhere miles better and build a career that moves just as fast.



Back in 2009, our CEO Angus saw half-empty vans everywhere and knew there had to be a better way! That's how AnyVan began. He set out to create the world's most efficient logistics technology and help halve the number of wasted miles by filling those empty vans.



Since then we've become the nation's favourite way to move, with over 150k five-star reviews and 5 million customers in the UK and Europe. Our team of 400 AnyVanners across London, Cape Town and Bogota is proving that moving doesn't have to cost the earth by helping save 8,520 tonnes of Carbon each year.





GRAN ENERGÍA. GRANDES TRATOS. GRANDES COMISIONES.

Cansado de trabajos que se sienten como el día de la marmota En AnyVan, aquí tienes la emoción de la venta sin el aburrimiento. Te damos clientes potenciales calientes, tú pones el talento comercial, y juntos hacemos grandes movimientos (literalmente… mudamos casas, pianos, jacuzzis, lo que sea —¡tenemos una furgoneta para eso!).



Tu Día a Día

 - Hablar con clientes españoles (en español) que ya nos necesitan (solo clientes potenciales calientes).

 - Generar confianza, vender de manera inteligente y cerrar con seguridad.

 - Gestionar tu cartera como si fuera tu propio negocio.

 - Colaborar con tu manager para seguir creciendo.

 - Compartir ideas que impulsen nuestro crecimiento.
   
   

Lo que NO Harás

 - Buscar clientes desde cero.

 - Perderte en bucles de tareas administrativas.

 - Malgastar energía en “trabajo por hacer”.



Lo Que Buscamos:

 - Experiencia en ventas con historial probado de superar objetivos.

 - Entusiasmo, resiliencia y hambre de éxito.

 - Habilidad para comunicarte y crear confianza rápidamente.

 - Mentalidad positiva: no te rindes cuando las cosas se ponen difíciles.

 - Atención al detalle y capacidad de aprender rápido.

 - Espíritu de equipo: disfrutas en un entorno de ventas dinámico y de apoyo.

 - Fluidez en inglés y español (oral y escrito).
   
   Nuestros patrones de turnos en Bogotá:
   
   De abril a octubre, Bogotá está 7 horas detrás de España.
   
   - Lunes a viernes: 2:00 a.m. - 1:00 p.m.
   
   - Sábado y domingo: 2:00 a.m. - 11:00 a. m.
     
   
   De noviembre a marzo, Bogotá está 6 horas detrás de España.
   
   - Lunes a viernes: 3:00 a.m. - 2:00 p.m.
   
   - Sábado y domingo: 3:00 a.m. - 12:00 p.m.
     
     

Por Qué AnyVan?

No somos un equipo de ventas cualquiera: somos un marketplace online en rápido crecimiento en toda Europa. Eso significa que tu carrera puede avanzar tan rápido como tus números. Recompensamos el rendimiento, no solo la presencia, y apoyamos tu desarrollo con formación práctica, reconocimiento y beneficios que hacen que el viaje merezca la pena.



 - Salario base competitivo: COP3-6.5mn al mes (DOE)

 - Comisiones ilimitadas con metas realistas: OTE COP 140mn + por año

 - Oportunidades claras de progresión profesional

 - Un ambiente de ventas dinámico y motivador



Our company values are:

 - Have fun, get it done

 - Progress over perfection

 - One team thinking big
   


YOU CAN FIND OUT MORE ABOUT OUR CULTURE HERE:

https://www.anyvan.com/careers



DE&I

We are committed to building an inclusive and diverse workplace where every voice is heard, every perspective is valued, and every individual has the opportunity to thrive. We welcome applicants from all backgrounds to be part of our mission and contribute to our vibrant culture.

source_jobs.title: Senior Development Engineer (Data)
source_jobs.description:
Got Drive? Join AnyVan as we make moving anything, anywhere miles better and build a career that moves just as fast.



Back in 2009, our CEO Angus saw half-empty vans everywhere and knew there had to be a better way! That's how AnyVan began. He set out to create the world's most efficient logistics technology and help halve the number of wasted miles by filling those empty vans.



Since then we've become the nation's favourite way to move, with over 150k five-star reviews and 5 million customers in the UK and Europe. Our team of 400 AnyVanners across London, Cape Town and Bogota is proving that moving doesn't have to cost the earth by helping save 8,520 tonnes of Carbon each year.


Build systems that move the real world, with AI at the core

At AnyVan, we're building one of the most sophisticated logistics optimisation platforms in Europe. We connect customer demand with real-time driver availability, using intelligent matching, dynamic pricing, and AI to deliver a world-class service at market-beating prices.



By routing jobs to vans already on the road, we reduce wasted miles, cut emissions, and ensure drivers earn fairly. It's logistics, pricing, and marketplace dynamics, driven by software and increasingly by machine intelligence.



We're looking for a senior engineer to work with our Allocations team. This is more focused on data and back end engineering problems relating to how our transport partners can access and get booked and allocated against the right jobs. This role will focus on the the data, platforms and tools that enables that to happen.




And we're moving fast.

We're embedding AI and machine learning across our core platform, not as experiments, but as production systems that drive real business outcomes:

 - Real-time, intelligent pricing that models true job-level costs and responds dynamically to supply, demand, and market conditions

 - Predictive demand and routing models that forecast driver availability and optimise job allocation before a customer even books

 - LLM-powered tooling across our internal and customer-facing products, from intelligent quoting to driver workflow automation

 - A two-sided marketplace where drivers can buy and sell jobs to maximise utilisation — powered by smart matching algorithms

This is genuinely leading-edge work: production AI systems, at scale, on problems that matter.


How our engineering teams deliver

We're product-led and agile. Most teams run Scrum with two-week sprints, but we care far more about outcomes than rituals. Engineers are trusted to challenge assumptions, adapt processes, and ship things that matter.



Senior engineers here are not heads-down implementers. You'll:

 - Work closely with product, data, and commercial stakeholders

 - Influence technical direction and architectural decisions

 - Balance speed with long-term sustainability

 - Regularly ship meaningful improvements to production


Our technology

We're pragmatic and cloud-first, running on AWS, with the flexibility to choose the right tool for the job:

 - Exploring: Go, Rust, React, Node.js

 - Core stack: Python, Vue.js & Nuxt, TypeScript

 - Legacy (retiring where we can): Java, PHP, Angular

You don't need experience in everything, we value strong fundamentals and good engineering judgement over keyword matching.


What you'll be doing

 - Designing, building, and operating production-grade systems that scale

 - Tackling complex technical challenges across backend, infrastructure, data flows, and AI/ML pipelines

 - Writing clean, pragmatic, well-tested code with long-term maintainability in mind

 - Collaborating with technical and non-technical stakeholders to shape solutions

 - Championing testing, observability, and quality improvements

 - Mentoring engineers and raising the technical bar across the team


You'll thrive here if you have

 - Experience in a scale-up or fast-growing product environment

 - Strong backend engineering skills (Go, Java, Python, or simila

 - Saturday and Sunday: 8:00 am – 6:00 pm

You'll usually work 40 hours a week within these times based on a 9hour shift pattern with 1 hour break.



Why AnyVan?
We’re not your average sales floor; we’re a fast-scaling online marketplace across Europe, which means your career can move as quickly as your numbers do. We reward performance, not just presence, and back your growth with hands-on coaching, recognition, and benefits that make the ride worth it.

source_jobs.title: Télévendeurs – AnyVan Sénégal
source_jobs.description:
Got Drive? Join AnyVan as we make moving anything, anywhere miles better and build a career that moves just as fast.



Back in 2009, our CEO Angus saw half-empty vans everywhere and knew there had to be a better way! That's how AnyVan began. He set out to create the world's most efficient logistics technology and help halve the number of wasted miles by filling those empty vans.



Since then we've become the nation's favourite way to move, with over 150k five-star reviews and 5 million customers in the UK and Europe. Our team of 400 AnyVanners across London, Cape Town and Bogota is proving that moving doesn't have to cost the earth by helping save 8,520 tonnes of Carbon each year.


Énergie Débordante. Deals Stratégiques. Commissions Sans Limites.

Vous en avez assez de la routine métro-boulot-dodo ? Chez AnyVan, nous vous offrons l'adrénaline de la vente sans les tâches ingrates. Nous vous fournissons des leads qualifiés (prospects chauds), vous apportez votre hargne commerciale, et ensemble, nous faisons bouger les choses (au sens propre… qu’il s’agisse de maisons, de pianos ou de jacuzzis, nous avons un camion pour tout!).



Votre Quotidien

 - Échanger en français avec des clients qui ont déjà besoin de nos services (pas de prospection à froid).

 - Instaurer la confiance, pratiquer l’upselling intelligent et conclure avec assurance.

 - Gérer votre portefeuille comme s'il s'agissait de votre propre entreprise.

 - Collaborer avec votre manager pour monter en compétences continuellement.

 - Partager vos analyses pour participer activement à notre croissance.a vente sans les tâches ingrates. Nous vous fournissons des leads qualifiés (prospects chauds), vous apportez votre hargne commerciale, et ensemble, nous faisons bouger les choses (au sens propre… qu’il s’agisse de maisons, de pianos ou de jacuzzis, nous avons un camion pour tout !).
   



Ce que vous ne ferez PAS

 - Chasser des prospects dans le vide.

 - Vous perdre dans des tâches administratives interminables.

 - Gaspiller votre énergie sur du "remplissage".



Le Profil Recherché

 - Bilingue : Maîtrise parfaite de l’anglais et du français (oral et écrit).

 - Expertise : Une expérience confirmée en vente avec un historique de dépassement d'objectifs.

 - Mindset : Enthousiasme, résilience et une soif de réussite.

 - Soft Skills : Excellent communicant, capable de créer un lien immédiat avec le client.

 - Rigueur : Esprit positif, souci du détail et capacité d'apprentissage rapide.

 - Esprit d’équipe : Vous vous épanouissez dans un environnement dynamique et solidaire.



Pourquoi rejoindre AnyVan ?

Nous ne sommes pas un centre d'appels classique. Nous sommes une marketplace technologique en pleine expansion à travers l'Europe. Chez nous, votre carrière évolue aussi vite que vos résultats. Nous récompensons la performance, pas seulement la présence, et nous soutenons votre progression par un coaching de proximité et des avantages qui font la différence.



Nos Avantages

 - 💰 Rémunération Compétitive : Salaire de base entre 350 000 et 700 000 FCFA par mois (selon expérience) + Commissions non plafonnées.

 - 🚀 Évolution de Carrière : Rejoignez un leader de la "Tech disruptive" et propulsez votre parcours professionnel.

Our company values are:

 - Have fun, get it done

 - Progress over perfection

 - One team thinking big
   


YOU CAN FIND OUT MORE ABOUT OUR CULTURE HERE:

https://www.anyvan.com/careers



DE&I

We are committed to building an inclusive and diverse workplace where every voice is heard, every perspective is valued, and every individual has the opportunity to thrive. We welcome applicants from all backgrounds to be part of our mission and contribute to our vibrant culture.

source_jobs.title: Transport Partner Operations Executive - France
source_jobs.description:
Got Drive? Join AnyVan as we make moving anything, anywhere miles better and build a career that moves just as fast.



Back in 2009, our CEO Angus saw half-empty vans everywhere and knew there had to be a better way! That's how AnyVan began. He set out to create the world's most efficient logistics technology and help halve the number of wasted miles by filling those empty vans.



Since then we've become the nation's favourite way to move, with over 150k five-star reviews and 5 million customers in the UK and Europe. Our team of 400 AnyVanners across London, Cape Town and Bogota is proving that moving doesn't have to cost the earth by helping save 8,520 tonnes of Carbon each year.


Our TP Operations Executives play a vital role in supporting and managing our Transport Partners (TPs), the driving force on the supply side of our business. They act as a crucial link between AnyVan and our TP network, ensuring we attract, onboard, and retain high-performing partners who deliver exceptional service to our customers.



What you’ll be doing:

Recruitment and onboarding

 - Source and recruit new TPs in the French market.
   Get them set up on our portal and app so they know exactly how to bid on and complete jobs.

 - Deliver training and support to help them succeed and meet AnyVan’s quality standards.


Support & Build Relationships

 - Be the friendly, reliable point of contact for our TPs – helping with questions about accounts, jobs, or how to use the platform.

 - Keep up-to-date lists of who’s available, where they’re based, and what jobs they can cover.

 - Build trust with both TPs and customers by solving problems quickly and keeping everyone informed.


Keep Things Running Smoothly

 - Assign jobs to the right TPs, negotiating rates so everyone’s happy.

 - Manage quotes and make proactive calls to secure the best deals for both TPs and AnyVan.

 - Keep an eye on TP performance – stepping in if there are issues like low feedback scores or compliance concerns.

 - Tackle compliance and service quality issues head-on to reduce cancellations and keep standards high.

 - Make sure all regular TP account management tasks are ticked off on time.


Be There for Customers

 - On the day of service, you’ll often be the first point of contact for our customers, answering questions, troubleshooting, and making sure they feel supported.

 - Work with both customers and TPs to make sure deadlines are met and any hiccups are quickly sorted out.

 - Keep customer records accurate and up to date.

 - Team up with other departments to make sure customers always get the best experience.


General Admin

 - Handle things like checking proof of delivery, invoicing, pricing updates, and charge management.




What you'll need to succeed:

 - A proven track record of achieving and exceeding goals in a fast-paced customer service or telesales role.

 - Strong communication and rapport-building skills, especially over the phone.

 - Excellent active listening skills and the ability to resolve issues effectively.

 - Resilience, positivity, and a proactive approach.

 - Exceptional organisation and attention to detail.

 - A strong bias for action, able to get things done quickly and effectively.

 - Resilience, drive, and a positive, can-do attitude.

 - A bias for action, with the ability to deliver results quickly and effectively.

 - Fluent in French and English – You’ll be working with French-speaking customers, but as English is our common business language, you’ll need to communicate fluently in both.

 - Location & Hours – Based in our Cape Town working flexible shift patterns in line with our French operating hours which will include working some weekends (Saturday's and Sunday's)


What We Offer:

💰 Competitive Salary + commission

🌴 Generous Time Off - 20 days annual leave

💪 Health & Wellbeing - ZAR1000 pr month towards cover with Momentum/Discovery

📈 Future Ready - 5% you, 5% us

🚲 Easy Travel - Free parking or transport home aft

source_jobs.title: Senior Software Development Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Got Drive? Join AnyVan as we make moving anything, anywhere miles better and build a career that moves just as fast.



Back in 2009, our CEO Angus saw half-empty vans everywhere and knew there had to be a better way! That's how AnyVan began. He set out to create the world's most efficient logistics technology and help halve the number of wasted miles by filling those empty vans.



Since then we've become the nation's favourite way to move, with over 150k five-star reviews and 5 million customers in the UK and Europe. Our team of 400 AnyVanners across London, Cape Town and Bogota is proving that moving doesn't have to cost the earth by helping save 8,520 tonnes of Carbon each year.


Build systems that move the real world, with AI at the core

At AnyVan, we're building one of the most sophisticated logistics optimisation platforms in Europe. We connect customer demand with real-time driver availability, using intelligent matching, dynamic pricing, and AI to deliver a world-class service at market-beating prices.

By routing jobs to vans already on the road, we reduce wasted miles, cut emissions, and ensure drivers earn fairly. It's logistics, pricing, and marketplace dynamics, driven by software and increasingly by machine intelligence.



We're looking for a senior engineer to work with our Allocations team. This is more focused on data and back end engineering problems relating to how our transport partners can access and get booked and allocated against the right jobs. This role will focus on the the data, platforms and tools that enables that to happen.



And we're moving fast.

We're embedding AI and machine learning across our core platform, not as experiments, but as production systems that drive real business outcomes:

 - Real-time, intelligent pricing that models true job-level costs and responds dynamically to supply, demand, and market conditions

 - Predictive demand and routing models that forecast driver availability and optimise job allocation before a customer even books

 - LLM-powered tooling across our internal and customer-facing products, from intelligent quoting to driver workflow automation

 - A two-sided marketplace where drivers can buy and sell jobs to maximise utilisation — powered by smart matching algorithms

This is genuinely leading-edge work: production AI systems, at scale, on problems that matter.


How our engineering teams deliver

We're product-led and agile. Most teams run Scrum with two-week sprints, but we care far more about outcomes than rituals. Engineers are trusted to challenge assumptions, adapt processes, and ship things that matter.

Senior engineers here are not heads-down implementers. You'll:

 - Work closely with product, data, and commercial stakeholders

 - Influence technical direction and architectural decisions

 - Balance speed with long-term sustainability

 - Regularly ship meaningful improvements to production


Our technology

We're pragmatic and cloud-first, running on AWS, with the flexibility to choose the right tool for the job:

 - Exploring: Go, Rust, React, Node.js

 - Core stack: Python, Vue.js & Nuxt, TypeScript

 - Legacy (retiring where we can): Java, PHP, Angular

You don't need experience in everything, we value strong fundamentals and good engineering judgement over keyword matching.


What you'll be doing

 - Designing, building, and operating production-grade systems that scale

 - Tackling complex technical challenges across backend, infrastructure, data flows, and AI/ML pipelines

 - Writing clean, pragmatic, well-tested code with long-term maintainability in mind

 - Collaborating with technical and non-technical stakeholders to shape solutions

 - Championing testing, observability, and quality improvements

 - Mentoring engineers and raising the technical bar across the team


You'll thrive here if you have

 - Experience in a scale-up or fast-growing product environment

 - Strong backend engineering skills (Go, Java, Python, or similar)

source_jobs.title: Growth Specialist
source_jobs.description:
Got Drive? Join AnyVan as we make moving anything, anywhere miles better and build a career that moves just as fast.



Back in 2009, our CEO Angus saw half-empty vans everywhere and knew there had to be a better way! That's how AnyVan began. He set out to create the world's most efficient logistics technology and help halve the number of wasted miles by filling those empty vans.



Since then we've become the nation's favourite way to move, with over 150k five-star reviews and 5 million customers in the UK and Europe. Our team of 400 AnyVanners across London, Cape Town and Bogota is proving that moving doesn't have to cost the earth by helping save 8,520 tonnes of Carbon each year.




We are looking for a Growth Specialist to execute alongside our senior leaders and run the projects that matter most to our global expansion. You won’t be boxed into a specific geography, a single channel, or a swim lane. Instead, you operate as an execution fixer: you will deploy wherever the highest-leverage growth opportunities are, working in tandem with marketing, product, sales, and operations to turn hypotheses into real, commercial results.



Working closely with our Growth Lead, you will be a vital driver behind our most critical initiatives. We aren't looking for coordinators to manage agency timelines, format status decks, or update ticket backlogs. We need a commercial operator who brings analytical agility, a fierce bias for action, and zero fear of moving fast in the gray area. This is the ultimate blend of sharp execution and directly driving the plot forward early in your career.



The core of the role:

 - Own the Outcome: You are responsible for hitting the targets inside your current project. If a blocker pops up, you don't wait for permission or an instruction manual, you collaborate across teams, find a workaround, and keep moving.

 - Seek the Paths that Scale: We focus on the chunky things that have a material impact. You’ll help ship experiments fast, read the immediate feedback loops, and help build the foundations for repeatable growth playbooks.

 - Commercial Focus: We don't live in a world of vanity metrics. Your success will be measured on hard outcomes: volume of users acquired, conversion rates, CAC efficiency, and revenue generated.

 - Using AI vs talking about it: We are an AI-native team. You won't be using it just to tidy up copy or format slides; you will use AI tools creatively from day one to execute execution tasks in minutes that take traditional teams days, maximizing your velocity.



What you'll be doing:

 - Executing critical campaigns: Take ownership of driving specific, high-priority customer segments. Examples could be launching a localized acquisition campaign, building the machine to acquire SMEs, or owning the playbook to rapidly scale student acquisition.

 - Creating leverage across teams: You won't be siloed in marketing. You’ll work alongside product, sales, and operations to ship experiments, gather feedback, and ensure your growth sprints are delivered smoothly.

 - Interrogating the data: You will live in the numbers. While we have data experts, you need to be comfortable pulling and manipulating raw performance data yourself to find out why a campaign is or isn't converting.

 - Moving at pace and taking intelligent risks: You'll build and ship a scrappy V1 of an idea today, look at the data tomorrow, and iterate. You don't stall out waiting for perfect information, you learn by doing it for real.

 - Please note we are unable to offer visa sponsorship for this role at this time.



Skills and experience you'll need:

 - A startup mindset: 3+ years of experience in growth, performance marketing, BizOps, or consulting. Side hustles or personal building projects are a massive plus.

 - Commercial fluency: You understand the connection between execution and the bottom line. You are highly analytical and comfortable diving deep into a spreadsheet to track campaign economics.

 - Broad c

source_jobs.title: Growth Lead - Special Projects
source_jobs.description:
Got Drive? Join AnyVan as we make moving anything, anywhere miles better and build a career that moves just as fast.



Back in 2009, our CEO Angus saw half-empty vans everywhere and knew there had to be a better way! That's how AnyVan began. He set out to create the world's most efficient logistics technology and help halve the number of wasted miles by filling those empty vans.



Since then we've become the nation's favourite way to move, with over 150k five-star reviews and 5 million customers in the UK and Europe. Our team of 400 AnyVanners across London, Cape Town and Bogota is proving that moving doesn't have to cost the earth by helping save 8,520 tonnes of Carbon each year.




We are looking for a Growth Lead to own and execute the projects that matter most to our global expansion. You won’t be boxed into a specific geography, a single channel, or a swim lane. Instead, you operate as a fixer: you will deploy wherever the highest-leverage growth opportunities are, and work in tandem with marketing, product, pricing, sales, and operations to make sure they are successful.


Reporting directly to the CMO, you will be the driving force behind our most critical initiatives. We aren't looking for coordinators to manage agencies, build alignment decks, or pass tickets down a line. We need a commercial full-stack operator who brings raw analytical depth, a fierce bias for action, and zero fear of ambiguity. This is the ultimate blend of high-level commercial strategy and directly driving the plot forwards.



The Core of The Role:

 - Own the Outcome: You are entirely accountable for your project. If a hurdle pops up outside of marketing, you don't need to wait for a roadmap, you can dive in and fix it.

 - Seek the Paths that Scale: This is all about doing the chunky things that have material impact on the business, and you’ll need to help identify the big wins from the small ones.

 - Commercial Focus: It’s not a role built on vanity metrics, you’ll be moving revenue, conversion rates, CAC, and efficiency.

 - Using AI vs talking about it: There’s those talking some good talk, but this is about working with our engineers to legitimately productionise new ways of working that drive value for our customers, not using it to write presentations.



What you'll be doing:

 - Driving critical initiatives: Own high-stake growth projects from diagnosis to cross-functional playbook, examples could be getting our next market ready for launch, working on a loyalty program, or deciding how we can improve our product for SMEs - it will be a constant rotation of exciting growth areas.

 - Creating leverage across teams: This is not about following a pre-defined product roadmap and supporting it with go-to-market, instead you’ll be directly adding to it and defining it, and also working across sales and ops to ensure it’s delivered.

 - Interrogating the data: We have data science in the team, but you’ll need to be comfortable pulling and analysing your own numbers directly to spot opportunities, and measure progress.

 - Moving at pace and taking intelligent risks: Data will often be imperfect, and the fastest way to learn is to do it for real, as long as there’s a solid thought process in place.



Skills and Experience You'll need:

 - High agency: Background in startups, scaleups, BizOps, or Chief of Staff roles. You can be handed a vague brief and execute it flawlessly.

 - Commercial fluency: You talk in revenue, contribution margi, and conversion. You get into the raw data yourself to find the truth.

 - A full-stack toolkit: Varied career path preferred. You are not a single-channel specialist; you can move between product, ops, and marketing.

 - Bias for action: You love shipping fast and get frustrated by red tape and corporate bureaucracy. You'd rather ask for forgiveness than permission.

 - Act like a founder: Self-motivated, comfortable with pressure, and ready to roll up your sleeves to get things done, vs a ‘but that’s n

source_jobs.title: Head of Sales - Spain
source_jobs.description:
Got Drive? Join AnyVan as we make moving anything, anywhere miles better and build a career that moves just as fast.



Back in 2009, our CEO Angus saw half-empty vans everywhere and knew there had to be a better way! That's how AnyVan began. He set out to create the world's most efficient logistics technology and help halve the number of wasted miles by filling those empty vans.



Since then we've become the nation's favourite way to move, with over 150k five-star reviews and 5 million customers in the UK and Europe. Our team of 400 AnyVanners across London, Cape Town and Bogota is proving that moving doesn't have to cost the earth by helping save 8,520 tonnes of Carbon each year.





BIG LEADERSHIP. BIG ACCOUNTABILITY. BIG GROWTH.



At AnyVan, growth isn’t a buzzword, it’s how we operate.

We’re looking for a Head of Sales who doesn’t hide behind dashboards, decks, or job titles. This is a hands-on, player-coach leadership role for someone who thrives on being on the floor, in the detail, and in the action.



You’ll be leading a growing team in our Bogota office who support our customers in Spain. This is also a genuine opportunity for the right person to act as General Manager for the Bogota office.



What you’ll be doing

You’ll be accountable for building and leading a high-performing, commercially disciplined organisation that delivers sustainable revenue growth, strong conversion, and exceptional customer outcomes. You’ll develop agents, team leaders, and managers into a cohesive, scalable team, and you’ll do it by showing up, coaching hard, and setting the standard every day.



Own sales performance, end to end

Take full accountability for revenue growth, conversion rates, forecasting accuracy, and execution against targets. You'll translate business objectives into clear, focused sales strategies and make sure they land.



Build and lead a high-performing team

Lead agents, team leaders, and managers with clarity and intent. You’ll define roles, expectations, and ownership at every level, while building scalable structures and processes that support growth.



Coach hard. Develop leaders. Raise the bar.

Spend real time coaching; live calls, floor-side feedback, structured sessions. Develop leadership capability in your management layer and drive excellence in discovery, qualification, value-based selling, and objection handling.



Run the numbers - properly

Set clear KPIs, lead forecasting and pipeline reviews, and use data to spot trends, diagnose issues, and make commercial decisions fast. You’ll manage performance tightly and address underperformance early.



Stay close to the action

You’ll be visible, involved, and hands-on, jumping into deals, unblocking problems, and supporting the team in real time. This role lives on the sales floor, not behind slides.



Partner across the business

Work closely with Marketing, Customer Service, and Transport teams to improve outcomes, refine tools and scripts, and contribute to broader commercial planning.



You'll thrive here if you;

 - Are a proven sales leader who leads from the front

 - Have strong commercial judgement and turn strategy into execution

 - Are deeply data-literate and confident making decisions from the numbers

 - Communicate directly, honestly, and without politics

 - Hold yourself and others to a high standard, “good enough” isn’t

 - Thrive in fast-growth environments with changing priorities

 - Believe problems are solved, not escalated or explained away
   
   

What you'll bring:

 - Proven and in depth leadership experience in a fast paced B2C sales environment

 - Strong commercial acumen with hands-on execution capability

 - Demonstrated success coaching sales teams and sales leaders

 - Data-driven approach

 - Excellent influencing and stakeholder management skills

 - Resilient, accountable, and action-oriented leadership style

 - Strong understanding of value-based or solution selling (e.g. SPIN)

 - Must be currently loc

source_jobs.title: Sales Executive - German Speaking
source_jobs.description:
Got Drive? Join AnyVan as we make moving anything, anywhere miles better and build a career that moves just as fast.



Back in 2009, our CEO Angus saw half-empty vans everywhere and knew there had to be a better way! That's how AnyVan began. He set out to create the world's most efficient logistics technology and help halve the number of wasted miles by filling those empty vans.



Since then we've become the nation's favourite way to move, with over 150k five-star reviews and 5 million customers in the UK and Europe. Our team of 400 AnyVanners across London, Cape Town and Bogota is proving that moving doesn't have to cost the earth by helping save 8,520 tonnes of Carbon each year.




Big Energy. Big Deals. Big Paydays.


Four our reverse auction sales executives at At AnyVan, sales isn’t “answer the phone and take the order.” It’s where we win customers, build trust fast, and convert with discipline in real time.



We’re hiring a Reverse Auction Sales Executive who doesn’t hide behind scripts, slow follow-ups, or “I’ll email you a quote.” This is a fast-paced, high-volume, commercial role for someone who thrives on pace, pressure, and negotiation, turning warm demand into booked revenue by running live competition between suppliers.



You’ll be accountable for converting inbound enquiries into confirmed bookings through speed, negotiation, pipeline ownership, and commercial judgement every day.


What you'll be doing:

 - Own your desk like a business: You’ll manage your pipeline end-to-end response time, follow-ups, conversion, margin, and booked revenue.

 - Move fast on warm inbound leads: Contact customers within minutes, control the call, qualify quickly, and keep momentum high.

 - Run live reverse auctions: Engage multiple transport partners to compete for the job and secure the best viable rate.

 - Negotiate with confidence: Balance customer value and supplier pricing while protecting margin and booking quality.

 - Convert with discipline: Drive every enquiry to a clear outcome, booked, timed follow-up, or closed out properly.

 - Upsell value where it matters: Add services that genuinely improve the customer outcome and increase booking value.

 - Track your numbers daily: You’ll manage activity → conversion → revenue and know exactly what lever to pull to win more.
   
   

You'll thrive here if you:

 - Love pressure and do your best work when targets are tough

 - Obsess over speed → negotiation → conversion, and know how to win in each moment

 - Can juggle multiple live deals without dropping detail or standards

 - Bring energy and ownership, you don’t need chasing

 - Treat sales like a competitive sport: disciplined, daily, relentless

 - Enjoy commercial problem-solving and protecting margin while winning customers
   
   

This is NOT:

 - A call centre “take the order” role

 - A slow sales cycle where you wait days for decisions

 - Role for someone who avoids negotiation or feels uncomfortable talking about money

 - A place to hide behind “the customer ghosted” you own follow-up and urgency

 - For you if you need to be micromanaged to stay sharp on pace, pipeline, and targets

 - A discount-first environment, we win with speed, value, and control
   
   
   

What you'll bring:

 - Proven success in a high-performance, target-driven sales environment

 - Strong negotiation ability and commercial instinct (margin mindset)

 - You’re a strong communicator who can build rapport quickly.

 - Comfort handling objections, controlling calls, and closing confidently

 - Excellent pipeline discipline and follow-up execution

 - You bring enthusiasm, resilience, and the hunger to succeed.

 - You pay attention to detail and learn fast.

 - You thrive in a buzzing, supportive sales floor.

 - You speak and write both German and English fluently.
   

Bonus points: experience in logistics/freight brokerage, 360° recruitment, estate agency, car sales, insurance broking, or marketplace businesses.



Why AnyVa

notes: AnyVan is a logistics company with a strong sales focus, but also has some tech roles. The company has a large customer base and is expanding its operations.
